title: Run focused task-pull verification and hygiene checks
forbidden_scope: Do not edit production source files.
Do not paste full command output into the board.
Do not treat known CLI lint dependency failure as a pass.
acceptance: Write a verifier summary with command, status, exit_code, summary, relevant_errors, and full_log.
Focused API and CLI checks are covered or explicitly marked not run with reason.
Line-count/hygiene checks cover touched source and docs.

verification.command: Run focused Jest/type-check/build/prettier/line-count/diff/conflict/trailing-whitespace commands with logs under /tmp/codex-tool-runs/svton/.
